programme.title: Aspettando Il Gp Della Gran Bretagna '26 29/06/2026
programme.desc: ... '26 29/06/2026. - Riviviamo insieme tutte le forti emozioni che ci sono state trasmesse durante gli scorsi Gran Premi in attesa della gara di Formula 1.

programme.title: Reparto Corse F1
programme.desc: Davide Camicioli e Matteo Bobbi presentano e analizzano i week end di gara di Formula 1. I momenti principali, le parole dei protagonisti e le prospettive mondiali dei contendenti.

programme.title: GP Austria: Gara
programme.desc: Ottava gara del mondiale in casa della Red Bull. Antonelli guida la classifica con 41 punti su Hamilton e 50 su Russell. Telecronaca di Carlo Vanzini, Marc Gene' e Roberto Chinchero.

programme.title: Ep.2
programme.desc: Alle origini del nuovo talento italiano della F1: in questo episodio il percorso di Antonelli nella massima categoria. Gli alti e bassi dell'anno da rookie, prima della definitiva esplosione del 2026.

programme.title: Inside F1
programme.desc: Dietro le quinte della F1: il viaggio nel Media & Technology Centre di Biggin Hill. Con Davide Camicioli e Ivan Capelli.

programme.title: Reparto Corse F1
programme.desc: Davide Camicioli e Matteo Bobbi presentano e analizzano i week end di gara di Formula 1. I momenti principali, le parole dei protagonisti e le prospettive mondiali dei contendenti.

programme.title: Austria
programme.desc: L'analisi del Gran Premio disputato per commentare la gara insieme agli ospiti in studio. Riviviamo i brividi della corsa attraverso le immagini piu' spettacolari e ascoltiamo i commenti a caldo dei protagonisti.

programme.title: Gran Bretagna 2013 - F1
programme.desc: Ottavo appuntamento stagionale. In pole position Hamilton su Mercedes, seguito dal compagno di scuderia Rosberg. In seconda fila le Red Bull Racing-Renault di Vettel e Webber.

programme.title: Gran Bretagna 1998 - F1
programme.desc: Nona gara della stagione con il finlandese Hakkinen che nelle qualifiche sul circuito di Silverstone conquista la pole position. In seconda posizione Michael Schumacher.

programme.title: Gran Bretagna 2019 - F1
programme.desc: Riviviamo il Gran Premio di Gran Bretagna! Al via dei semafori si lotta fino all'ultimo giro. Bottas in pole position. #skymotori.

programme.desc: ... Powertrains. - Nel 2026 la Red Bull ha esordito, in partnership con Ford, come motorista: alla scoperta del lavoro di ricerca e di sviluppo della Power Unit di Milton Keynes con Mara Sangiorgio.

programme.desc: Anticipazioni entusiasmanti sulla prossima stagione 2023 direttamente dalla corsia dei box. Il giornalista britannico, esperto di Formula 1, Ted Kravitz racconta le manovre dal paddock e analizza il fine settimana.

programme.title: PL: Brighton v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: Off to a flying start in the post-Daniel Levy era, Tottenham make the trip to the South Coast for a Premier League clash with Brighton, who lost 2-1 away to Bournemouth previously. (20.09)

programme.title: PL: West Ham v C. Palace Hlts
programme.desc: Oliver Glasner - the first Palace manager to go 10 Premier League games unbeaten - takes his side to West Ham. The pressure is back on for Graham Potter after defeat to Spurs. (20.09)

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Nott'm Forest Hlts
programme.desc: Beaten by Liverpool in the cruellest of circumstances, what can Scott Parker's Burnley draw from this Premier League encounter with Forest and their new boss Ange Postecoglou? (20.09)

programme.title: PL: Wolves v Leeds Hlts
programme.desc: A crucial top-flight contest at Molineux, as bottom-of-the-pile Wolves - who have lost their first four matches in the Premier League - welcome Daniel Farke's Leeds United. (20.09)

programme.title: SNF: Man Utd v Chelsea Hlts
programme.desc: A Saturday Night Football doubleheader begins at Old Trafford with a blockbuster opener between Ruben Amorim's under-fire Manchester United and Enzo Maresca's unbeaten Chelsea. (20.09)

programme.title: SNF: Fulham v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Fulham host Brentford on Saturday Night Football at the Cottage. For the Bees, it's seven days removed since their last west-London derby which ended in a two-all draw with Chelsea. (20.09)

programme.title: PL: Bournemouth v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: Newcastle make the long trip to Bournemouth this Super Sunday with new forward Nick Woltemade in tow. The big German bagged the winner against Wolves on Premier League debut. (21.09)

programme.title: PL: Arsenal v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: Hot off last week's derby win, Pep Guardiola's City travel to London for a Super Sunday contest against Arsenal. The Gunners return to the Emirates after a 2-0 win in Bilbao midweek. (21.09

programme.title: PL: Leeds v Bournemouth Hlts
programme.desc: Daniel Farke's Leeds eye a third Premier League win of the campaign with Bournemouth's visit to Elland Road. Since losing on opening day, the Cherries have won three and drawn once. (27.09)

programme.desc: Bringing a point home from the Emirates, Manchester City host Scott Parker's Burnley next in the Premier League. The Clarets picked up a useful point last weekend against Forest. (27.09)

programme.title: PL: C. Palace v Liverpool Hlts
programme.desc: With a trip to Istanbul ahead, Arne Slot's Liverpool venture to Selhurst Park first for a Premier League clash with Oliver Glasner's rock-solid Palace - now 17 games unbeaten. (27.09)

programme.title: PL: Chelsea v Brighton Hlts

programme.title: SNF: N. Forest v Sunderland Hlts

programme.title: SNF: Spurs v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: Spurs and Wolves round out Saturday Night Football in north London. For Wolves, it's five Premier League defeats on the spin as Vitor Pereira's side look to ignite their season. (27.09)

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: As Fulham arrive at Villa Park for a Super Sunday clash with Unai Emery's men, will Aston Villa finally clinch three Premier League points after a poor start to the campaign? (28.09)

programme.title: PL: Newcastle v Arsenal Hlts
programme.desc: After achieving EFL Cup wins midweek, all eyes turn to St James' Park this Super Sunday, as Newcastle host Arsenal. The Gunners' last win in the north-east came back in April 2023. (28.09)

programme.title: PL: Spurs v Bournemouth Hlts
programme.desc: Spurs return home after a memorable win over City at the Etihad, with Thomas Frank's men taking on a Bournemouth side who added their first Premier League win of the season. (30.08)

programme.title: PL: Wolves v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Back on the road after christening their new stadium with a win, David Moyes' Everton venture to Molineux as opponents Wolves look to bounce back from consecutive defeats. (30.08)

programme.title: PL: Manchester Utd v Burnley Hlts
programme.desc: Manchester United's search for a first top-flight win of the campaign continues with the Clarets' visit. New boys Burnley got off the mark with a crucial 2-0 win over Sunderland. (30.08)

programme.title: SNF: Leeds v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: Saturday Night Football comes from Elland Road - home to new boys Leeds United, who welcome Eddie Howe's Newcastle side fresh from Monday night's breathless defeat to Liverpool. (30.08)

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v Arsenal Hlts
programme.desc: Two games into the new Premier League campaign, last season's top two - champions Liverpool and runners-up Arsenal - meet at Anfield for a blockbuster Super Sunday encounter. (31.08)

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v C. Palace Hlts

programme.title: PL: Newcastle v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: Bottom-of-the-table Wolves take three defeats on the spin to St James' Park for a clash with Eddie Howe's Newcastle, who return to action after a goalless draw with new boys Leeds. (13.09)

programme.title: PL: Everton v Aston Villa Hlts

programme.title: PL: Bournemouth v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: Bournemouth and Brighton return to Premier League action on the back of impressive wins prior to the break, with the Cherries beating Spurs and Brighton winning 2-1 at home to City. (13.09)

programme.title: PL: Fulham v Leeds Hlts
programme.desc: A chance for Marco Silva's Fulham to get off the mark after a winless start to the campaign. Three games into life back in the top flight, Leeds have four points to their name. (13.09)

programme.title: PL: C Palace v Sunderland Hlts

programme.title: SNF: West Ham v Spurs Hlts

programme.title: SNF: Brentford v Chelsea Hlts

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Liverpool Hlts
programme.desc: With three wins from three, a trip to Turf Moor comes next for Arne Slot's Liverpool on Super Sunday with opponents Burnley targeting the huge scalp of the Premier League champions. (14.09)

programme.title: PL: Man City v Man Utd Hlts
programme.desc: An intriguing Manchester derby sees Pep Guardiola's out-of-sorts City host Ruben Amorim's all-at-sea United, who steadied the ship before the break with a nervy win over Burnley. (14.09)

programme.title: PL: Brighton v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: Steering Brighton to eighth, Fabian Hurzeler's second season begins against Fulham, whose unbeaten top-flight record over the Seagulls came to an end when the two last met. (16.08)

programme.title: PL: Nott'm Forest v Brentford Hlts

programme.title: PL: Chelsea v Crystal Palace Hlts
programme.desc: The newly minted club world champions take on last weekend's Community Shield winners as Chelsea and Palace kickstart their Premier League campaigns on Super Sunday at the Bridge. (17.08)

programme.title: PL: Man Utd v Arsenal Hlts
programme.desc: On Super Sunday, United and Arsenal open their Premier League seasons at Old Trafford. With both sides boasting new forward lines, who will start their campaign off with a bang? (17.08)

programme.title: MNF: Leeds Utd v Everton Hlts

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Sunderland Hlts

programme.title: PL: Bournemouth v Wolves Hlts

programme.title: PL: Brentford v Aston Villa Hlts

programme.title: PL: Fulham v Man Utd Hlts
programme.desc: Ruben Amorim's much-improved Manchester United go in search of their first Premier League win of 2025-26 with a Super Sunday trip to face Marco Silva's Fulham at Craven Cottage. (24.08)

programme.title: EFL 17/18: Cardiff v Wolves
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Cardiff City host Wolves at the Cardiff City Stadium in 2018 in a match that had a dramatic ending.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: Derby County v Cardiff
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Derby County take on Cardiff City at Pride Park in the 2017-18 campaign in a match with implications in the play-off race.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: Derby County v Leeds
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Derby County take on Marcelo Bielsa's Leeds United at Pride Park in a Championship match that saw five goals.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: West Brom v Leeds Utd
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, West Brom take on Leeds United at The Hawthorns in a high-scoring Championship match that saw one side dominate.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: A. Villa v Birmingham
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Aston Villa host Birmingham City at Villa Park in a high-scoring Second City derby.

programme.title: EFL 17/18: Aston Villa v N. Forest
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the EFL. Here, Aston Villa host Nottingham Forest at Villa Park in an enthralling, end-to-end encounter that saw 10 goals.

programme.title: EFL 18/19: Aston Villa v Leeds Utd
programme.desc: In the dying embers of an 2018-19 Sky Bet Championship clash at Villa Park, Kemar Roofe's last-gasp goal sealed a famous Leeds comeback having trailed 2-0 to Aston Villa.

programme.title: EFL 18/19: Aston Villa v Sheff Utd
programme.desc: In 2019 at Villa Park, Tyrone Mings, Tammy Abraham and Andre Green saved Villa's blushes, scoring three goals in the final 10 minutes to steal a point from the visiting Sheffield United.

programme.title: EFL Cup 20/21:Man City v Tottenham
programme.desc: Manchester City take on Tottenham Hotspur in the Carabao Cup Final at Wembley Stadium, with 8,000 fans in attendance. City are looking for their fourth successive Cup victory.

programme.title: EFL Cup Best Goals: 2020/21
programme.desc: Look back at some stunning strikes from the 2020-21 Carabao Cup, with all of the best goals.

programme.title: EFL Trophy Final 2020/21
programme.desc: The unique Wembley Weekender concludes with the 2021 Papa John's Trophy final at Wembley Stadium, as Sunderland and Tranmere Rovers meet to decide this year's champions.
